name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual compilation causes delays in payment processing. We automate vendor payment summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
problem_solved: Manual compilation of vendor payment summaries is time-consuming and prone to errors.
features: email notifications to accounts payable teams

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual compilation of vendor payment summaries is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual compilation causes delays in payment processing. We automate vendor payment summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
must_have_features: email notifications to accounts payable teams

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual compilation causes delays in payment processing. We automate vendor payment summaries instead of manual spreadsheets and email communication.
